currentState: Brief command-friction transformed into utilitarian respect. Falric now reads Sylvanas less as interruption and more as one of the pressures that keeps forcing Arthas’s camp into its next shape.
powerDynamic: Falric still controls access and lane execution inside Arthas’s machine. Sylvanas still controls the urgency that keeps rewriting which lane matters.

physicalDynamics.pattern: He blocks the road in polished plate; she answers by leaning harder into command pressure instead of diplomacy until he steps aside.
In chapter 15 Falric’s body language is all fatigue and function: one sweep over the arrivals, one step aside, one pivot toward the next order.

nameUsage.falricCallsSylvanas: Still formal rank language, now without any illusion that protocol can shield the room from what she brings.
nameUsage.sylvanasCallsFalric: Still treats him as captain and mechanism inside Arthas’s camp, not as a personal rival.

history.event: Their only chapter-11 interaction is enough to define the pair: Falric tests the interruption against protocol and yields once he realizes the plague warning is already inside his camp.
Falric is present as the worn hinge of the command tent when Sylvanas’s intelligence and Jaina’s plan reshape the camp again.

trajectory: Gatekeeping friction -> functional respect -> chapter 15’s shared crisis professionalism.

stateHistory.currentState: Checkpoint friction turned functional respect. Falric starts as protocol barrier and ends as the officer who understands she was right to force the issue.
